name: canhav-contracts
description: CanHav Research — ERC-8004 agent registries (OpenZeppelin) on Arbitrum Sepolia

scripts.deploy:arbitrum-sepolia: bash scripts/check-deployer.sh && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy --rpc-url arbitrum_sepolia --broadcast --slow
